## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who hits it, and how often? Concrete scenarios beat abstract wishes. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature. If it's a new MCP tool, what is its name, inputs, and outputs? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why this one is preferable. -->

## Kanboard API mapping

<!-- If this maps to one or more Kanboard JSON-RPC methods, list them: -->

## Breaking changes

<!-- Does this change the input/output of an existing tool? If yes, describe the migration path. -->

- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I can test it
- [ ] No
